scripts.services:up: docker compose up -d --wait && (docker start zera-db || bun run db:up)
scripts.services:down: docker compose down && bun run db:down
scripts.db:up: docker run --name zera-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=zera -e POSTGRES_DB=zera -p 5432:5432 -d postgres:16
scripts.project:prepare: bun run services:up && bun run compact:compile && bun --filter @zera/contracts build && bun run copy-artifacts && bun run db:setup
scripts.start:all: bun run project:prepare && bun run deploy && bun run --parallel dev:web storage:dev
